seo.title: Video Edit – AI Video Edit Assistant | OpenCreator
seo.description: Automate rough cuts, highlight reels, and smart sequences with OpenCreator's Video Edit workflow, then finish polishing in your editor of choice.

hero.title: Video Edit
hero.description: AI-powered video editing assistant. Automate rough cuts, highlight reels, and smart sequences. Get a strong starting point, then polish in your favorite editor.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Upload footage and describe the edit you want

steps.title: Upload your source footage
steps.description: Provide long-form recordings, multi-cam material, or B-roll libraries that you want to turn into structured edits.

steps.title: Define target output and rules
steps.description: Specify the format you need (highlight reel, tutorial, podcast cutdown), desired duration, and key beats or segments to prioritize.

steps.title: Generate AI-edited sequences
steps.description: Run the Video Edit workflow so AI trims, orders, and stitches clips based on content, pacing, and your instructions.

steps.title: Refine in your NLE of choice
steps.description: Take the AI-generated edit as a starting timeline and tweak, polish, and finalize it inside your usual editing software.

whoIsFor.title: For editors who want to start from version 0.8, not 0.0
whoIsFor.subtitle: From social teams to production houses, see who edits faster with AI.

audiences.label: Video editors and post houses
audiences.description: Speed up assembly edits and rough cuts across many projects while keeping creative control in human hands.

audiences.label: Social and content teams
audiences.description: Generate multiple cutdowns of long-form content for different platforms without manually recreating every sequence.

audiences.label: Podcast and webinar producers
audiences.description: Trim long recordings quickly without watching the entire file for takedowns, highlights, and promotional snippets.

audiences.label: Solo creators
audiences.description: Reduce editing overhead so you can focus on story, performance, and finishing touches instead of pure assembly.

items.question: What does the Video Edit AI workflow do?
items.answer: This workflow automates time-consuming editing tasks like rough cuts, highlight reels, and basic sequences based on pacing and key moments. It's an AI assistant, not a full editor replacement.

items.question: What input should I provide?
items.answer: Upload raw footage and describe the edit you want—like '60-second highlight reel for TikTok' or 'remove long pauses.' Clear instructions help AI create better timelines.

items.question: Can this replace my video editing software?
items.answer: No. It gives you a strong starting point (version 0.8). You still refine color, sound, titles, and final pacing in your editing tool.

items.question: What projects benefit most?
items.answer: Long-form content needing cutdowns, podcasts requiring trimming, and social footage needing fast highlight reels all benefit from AI-assisted editing.

items.question: How do I use AI edits with my normal workflow?
items.answer: Run this workflow to generate a first sequence, then export or recreate that structure in your editing software. Refine timing, transitions, graphics, and sound as usual.

items.question: How does pricing work?
items.answer: Each edit consumes credits based on input length and settings. Start with smaller batches or shorter sequences, then scale once you find settings that work.
